title: OWASP Smart Contract Secure Coding Playbook (2026)
description: OWASP Smart Contract Secure Coding Playbook (2026) is a practical implementation guide that translates the OWASP Smart Contract Top 10 into secure coding patterns, architectural safeguards, and testing strategies for production grade smart contracts.
